title: cyclobalanopsis marginata
intro: Cyclobalanopsis marginata, also known as the Chinese chestnut oak or Korean oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis marginata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea form or as an extract, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
